title: Build machine learning solutions using Azure Databricks
summary: Azure Databricks is a cloud-scale platform for data analytics and machine learning. Data scientists and machine learning engineers can use Azure Databricks to implement machine learning solutions at scale. (DP-3014)

sections.title: Build machine learning solutions using Azure Databricks
sections.summary: Azure Databricks is a cloud-scale platform for data analytics and machine learning. Data scientists and machine learning engineers can use Azure Databricks to implement machine learning solutions at scale. (DP-3014)

lessons.title: Use Apache Spark in Azure Databricks
lessons.content_md:
Use Apache Spark in Azure Databricks

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/use-apache-spark-azure-databricks/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Use Apache Spark in Azure Databricks

lessons.title: Train a machine learning model in Azure Databricks
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to train machine learning models using Spark and the MLlib library in Azure Databricks.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/machine-learning-azure-databricks/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Train a machine learning model in Azure Databricks

lessons.title: Use MLflow in Azure Databricks
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to use MLflow in Azure Databricks to track machine learning experiments and deploy models.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/mlflow-azure-databricks/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Tune hyperparameters in Azure Databricks
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to use the Optuna library in Azure Databricks to tune machine learning hyperparameters.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/hyperparameters-azure-databricks/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Use AutoML in Azure Databricks
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to use AutoML to train optimal machine learning models for your data in Azure Databricks.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/automl-azure-databricks/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Train deep learning models in Azure Databricks
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to use deep learning libraries like PyTorch in Azure Databricks, and to distribute training by using TorchDistributor

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/deep-learning-azure-databricks/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Train deep learning models in Azure Databricks

lessons.title: Manage machine learning in production with Azure Databricks
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to manage machine learning models in production with Azure Databricks.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/machine-learning-production-azure-databricks/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Manage machine learning in production with Azure Databricks

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Build machine learning solutions using Azure Databricks
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Build machine learning solutions using Azure Databricks**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
